subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One hath, throughout the nights and days, summoned the servants and handmaidens of God, glorified be His majesty, unto that which draweth them nigh unto Him. Some have hearkened thereunto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در لیالی و ایام عباد و اماء حق جل جلاله را بما یقربهم الی الله دعوت نموده بعضی باصغا فائز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @thankfulness; gratitude
